query: SELECT id, userId, redditUsername, isActive, tokenExpiresAt, FROM_UNIXTIME(tokenExpiresAt/1000) as token_expires FROM reddit_accounts LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2E9LwDmq6cTgS6X.1f00e7e95180 --database D6eMQgvSZZr9tsyS9zVhzn --execute SELECT id, userId, redditUsername, isActive, tokenExpiresAt, FROM_UNIXTIME(tokenExpiresAt/1000) as token_expires FROM reddit_accounts LIMIT 5;
